name: VR Classic Bricks: Block Puzzle
summary: The timeless puzzle legend returns in stunning VR! Step into a deep-space environment and master the art of the perfect fit. In VR Classic Bricks: Block Puzzle, you’ll manipulate falling blocks, clear lines, and reach for the ultimate high score. With intuitive controls and immersive 3D visuals, this is the classic block puzzle game as you've never seen it before!
